cards.name: Life Essence
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: +50% MAX HP. Each attack: drains 15% of the enemy's MAX HP and adds it to this card's MAX HP (does not work on boss cards)

cards.name: Swamp Hydra
cards.abilityDescription: Takes 20% less damage. 45% chance to counterattack twice when hit, each strike at 50% of this card's ATK

cards.name: Overlord
cards.abilityDescription: After attacking, heal 20% of damage dealt and gain +25% ATK. Caps at +75% ATK bonus.

cards.name: Oni Warlord
cards.abilityDescription: Gains +15% ATK each time an ally is defeated. If in the last party slot: gains an additional +30% ATK on entry

cards.name: Soul Warden
cards.abilityDescription: On death: revives a fallen ally at 25% HP with +50% ATK (once per battle)

cards.name: Arcane Construct
cards.abilityDescription: Every 2 turns, the currently active ally card deals 1.75x damage on their next attack

cards.name: Time Keeper
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: flips the active enemy's stats (HP becomes ATK, ATK becomes HP). Does not affect boss cards

cards.name: Storm Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start, create a Storm Domain for 8 turns. Allies gain 30% chance to attack twice. Storm Dragon has 10% chance to counterattack whenever an enemy attacks.

cards.name: Kraken
cards.abilityDescription: Every other attack (every 2nd) strikes all enemies simultaneously for 50% of ATK

cards.name: Diver
cards.abilityDescription: Gains 10% DR per turn (cap 30%). At cap: explodes for 30% MAX HP to the current enemy — excess damage carries to the next enemy card, then pressure resets

cards.name: Skeleton King
cards.abilityDescription: Upon death: all enemies lose 20% of their current HP instantly

cards.name: Eclipse Beast
cards.abilityDescription: Every 3rd turn, attacks stun the enemy. Deal 50% extra damage to stunned enemies.

cards.name: Elder Glimmer
cards.abilityDescription: Every 2nd attack: deals 1.5x damage and heals 15% MAX HP. 30% chance on those attacks to also mind-control the current enemy for 1 turn (they attack their own next ally)

cards.name: Earth Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: Regains 10% MAX HP after each kill (cannot exceed MAX HP). On death: spawns a Sproutling with 25% of this card's stats

cards.name: Death Tree
cards.abilityDescription: At battle start: sacrifices the first alive ally (skipping other Death Trees) and gains 25% of its stats. On death: revives that ally with 75% of its original stats

cards.name: Rift Destroyer
cards.abilityDescription: On entry: deals 20% of ATK to all enemy cards

cards.name: Siren
cards.abilityDescription: Each attack: 15% chance to confuse the enemy for 1 turn (they attack themselves), permanently reduce their ATK by 15%, and add the stolen ATK to Siren's own ATK

cards.name: Bone Drake
cards.abilityDescription: At < 25% HP: gains a one-hit block. On death: transfers this exact ability to the next ally

cards.name: Bone Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: On death: spawns 2 Bone Drakes with 20% of this card's HP

cards.name: Air Dragon
cards.abilityDescription: After each attack: 20% chance to dodge the next enemy attack, OR 20% chance to redirect it to one of their own teammates (60% chance nothing happens)
